failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure
Install inline filter upstream of BPR

failure_modes.cause: Exothermic reaction due to quench failure
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement temperature monitoring and automatic quench system

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=3.53429 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR valve with particulate-laden solvent to assess blockage risk
Simulate quench failure scenario to evaluate thermal runaway risk
